overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V featuring the character Michael standing on an elevated metal walkway overlooking a waterfront park and the Los Santos skyline during golden hour. The character transitions from a stationary pose to walking down the grated ramp toward the plaza below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront overlook with metal walkway

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at the top of the metal ramp, facing the city skyline and waterfront park below

entered.detail: metal grated ramp with diamond pattern texture under character's feet
black metal pipe handrail running along the left side of the walkway
textured concrete wall with metal railing on top, covered in graffiti on the right side
cluster of modern glass skyscrapers and high-rise buildings against the sunset sky
large leafy tree with thick trunk beside the walkway
open paved area with scattered pedestrians and park benches below the overlook

segments.scene_description: The character stands stationary on an elevated metal grated walkway during golden hour, overlooking the Los Santos skyline and a waterfront plaza below. The warm sunset light illuminates the modern glass skyscrapers in the distance while a large oak tree stands to the right and a concrete retaining wall borders the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending metal ramp toward waterfront promenade

events.description: character begins walking down the metal ramp from a stationary position

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the grated metal ramp toward the waterfront plaza below

segments.scene_description: The character descends the metal walkway ramp toward the waterfront plaza, with the grated surface and left handrail moving from near to mid-ground perspective. The concrete retaining wall on the right passes out of view behind the camera as the plaza below comes into closer view and the city skyline shifts toward the left of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stationary vantage point on an elevated walkway down toward a waterfront plaza during the golden hour. It begins with the character overlooking the Los Santos skyline, where warm sunset light illuminates modern glass skyscrapers and a large oak tree stands beside a concrete retaining wall. As the character begins to move, the camera descends the metal grated ramp, causing the handrail to shift from the foreground into a mid-ground perspective. The concrete wall then passes out of view behind the camera as the plaza below opens up and the city skyline gradually shifts toward the left of the frame.
